narrative:
Precinct Bellevue 3 (precinct in Huron County) has 1,046 registered voters, with 63.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.1%, a modest Republican lean of 2.4 percentage points.
